flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of California-Riverside rose 19% between 2007 and 2010 ($10.5k → $12.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of California-Riverside rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($43.5k → $49.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of California-Riverside rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.8k → $15.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of California-Riverside fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
